difficulty.rationale: Requires concurrent single-flight, SWR background refresh dedup, negative cache TTL, per-key isolation, and memory bounds under parallel load.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: GET /compute/:key returns value and cached flag.
Concurrent misses for the same key invoke compute once.
must_not: Invoke compute N times for N concurrent misses on one key.
Block unrelated keys during single-flight on another key.
edge_cases: After TTL expiry serve stale immediately with one background refresh.
fail- keys negative-cache briefly then retry.
LRU eviction bounds cache size at 20 entries.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
